General.Name: Puxing Clean Energy Ltd
General.GicIndustry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
General.Description: Puxing Energy Limited, an investment holding company, develops, operates, and manages natural gas-fired power plants in the People's Republic of China. It owns natural gas-fired power plants, as well as engages in heating capacity related services. The company also operates natural gas power plant which has aggregate capacity of approximately of 687MW; and engages in the construction of distributed photovoltaic power generating units which has aggregate capacity of 1,072kW. In addition, it offers power generation and heat supply. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China. Puxing Energy Limited is a subsidiary of Puxing International Limited.
